title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BATAC CENTRAL SCHOOL TO MARIANO MARCOS MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17928 / 65 OG No. 41, 10846 (October 13, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5484, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BATAC CENTRAL SCHOOL TO MARIANO MARCOS MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Batac Central School is hereby change to Mariano Marcos Memorial Elementary School.

SEC 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
